IntuneManifest.Name: SCR-SYS-102 - Set Desktop Wallpaper
IntuneManifest.Description: Downloads and sets a corporate desktop wallpaper for the currently logged-in user. Uses osascript to tell Finder to update the desktop picture, which is required on macOS 14+ where file replacement no longer triggers a refresh. Requires the companion PPPC profile (CFG-SYS-100).
